sections.title: Starting Rag and Bone Man I

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes. I'll give you a hand.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: You will? Excellent!

lines.speaker: Sack
lines.text: Sniggersnigger

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where do you need me to dig?

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Can I help you with something?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, err...who are you, and what are all these bones doing here?

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Errr...

lines.speaker: Sack
lines.text: Mumblemumble

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: I'm an archaeologist. I work with the museum.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: An archaeologist?

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well that explains the bones...sort of...but what are you doing all the way out here?

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Errr...

lines.speaker: Sack
lines.text: Mumblemumble. Mumblemumblemumble.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: I'm collecting bones for the museum.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: They have asked me to rig up some displays of second and third age creatures using their bones, so that people can come and...well, look at them.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: I need to get them into some sort of order before I begin, but I've run into a bit of a snag.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What sort of a snag?

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Well, I need to have all the bones I'm going to use here, and placed into some sort of order.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: However, I seem to have discovered I am a few short.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Anything I can do to help?

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Errr...

lines.speaker: Sack
lines.text: Mumblemumble

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: There is something you could do for me. I'm going to be busy...err...

lines.speaker: Sack
lines.text: Mumble

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Sorting, yes, sorting these bones out ready for the museum, but I need a few more.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Will you help me out by grabbing some?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes. I'll give you a hand.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: You will? Excellent!

lines.speaker: Sack
lines.text: Snicker.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where do you need me to dig?

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Dig?

lines.speaker: Sack
lines.text: Mumblemumble

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Oh, you must have got the wrong end of the stick.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: I need some fresh, whole bones to replace ones that have become damaged.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Err...

lines.speaker: Sack
lines.text: Mumblemumblemumblemumblemumble. Mumblemumblemumblemumble. Mumble.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Excuse me...

lines.speaker: Sack
lines.text: Shhh!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry...

lines.speaker: Sack
lines.text: Mumblemumble. Mumblemumblemumble.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Ok, got it.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Ok, here is the thing. While sorting out what bones I do have I managed to lose or damage a few. If you can get me some fresh, unbroken bones to use as replacements then I can get on with things.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: That make things clearer?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, it makes some sense I suppose...

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Great. If you can get me a bone from a Goblin, a Bear, a Big Frog, a Ram, a Unicorn, a Monkey, a Giant rat and a Giant Bat then I'll be able to move on with the...

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Displays...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So you just want me to bring you these bones and that will be that?

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Well, I wouldn't mind you sticking them in a pot and boiling them in vinegar first, if you don't mind.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: There is a Wine Merchant in Draynor called Fortunato that sells the stuff you'll need.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: You can even use my pot-boiler if you want.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why do I need to boil them in vinegar?

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: It gets them bright and sparking white.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: It's an archaeologist thing.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Just put the bone in a pot of vinegar, throw some logs on the fire, put the pot in the holder and light the logs.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: It takes a while for the vinegar to evaporate, but the bone will be nice and clean in the end.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: All right, I'll be back later.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Bye!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Oh...I see.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Well, never mind me young man, I'll just stagger over here under my massive burden, and continue my thankless task.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Unaided and alone...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, trying a guilt trip much?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well good luck with that!

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Thanks stranger!

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: What a polite young [man/woman]...

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Well, back to work!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where is that mumbling coming from?

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Errr...

lines.speaker: Sack
lines.text: Mumblemumble

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: What mumbling?

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Anyway, I have enough problems of my own without dealing with a delusional adventurer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I was just passing and I wondered if you still needed someone to help with the bones?

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Errr...

lines.speaker: Sack
lines.text: Mumblemumble

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: There is something you could do for me. I'm going to be busy...err...

lines.speaker: Sack
lines.text: Mumble

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Sorting, yes, sorting these bones out ready for the museum, but I need a few more.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Will you help me out by grabbing some?

sections.title: After Rag and Bone Man I

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So how is the sorting going?

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Err...

lines.speaker: Sack
lines.text: Mumblemumble

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: It's going well, especially now I have all the bones I need.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: There are still a few bits and pieces I wouldn't mind, but that's the way things go.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well if I see any bones I think you might like I'll bring them over.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Cheers, we, err, that is myself and the museum staff, really appreciate it.

lines.speaker: Sack
lines.text: Snicker.

sections.title: After Rag and Bone Man II

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I have a replacement helm? I managed to lose the last one.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: No problem. I have plenty after all.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I have a replacement bonesack? I managed to lose the last one.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: No problem. I have plenty after all.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How's the sorting going?

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Oh, the 'sorting' is going very well, very well indeed.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm glad to hear it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I exchange this helm for the bonesack?

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: I don't see why not.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: There you go.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Come up and see me if you want to swap back.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could I have a bonesack as well?

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: I... do have many of each. I suppose it wouldn't be a problem.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: There you go.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Come up and see me if you lose it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where was that mumbling coming from anyway?

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Errr...

lines.speaker: Sack
lines.text: Mumblemumble

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: What mumbling?

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: You must be hearing things. I think you need to have a lie down.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How's the sorting going?

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Oh, the 'sorting' is going very well, very well indeed.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm glad to hear it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I exchange this bonesack for the helm?

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: I don't see why not.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: There you go.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Come up and see me if you want to swap back.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could I have a helm as well?

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: I... do have many of each. I suppose it wouldn't be a problem.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: There you go.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Come up and see me if you lose it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How's the sorting going?

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Oh, the 'sorting' is going very well, very well indeed.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm glad to hear it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where was that mumbling coming from anyway?

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Errr...

lines.speaker: Sack
lines.text: Mumblemumble

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: What mumbling?

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: You must be hearing things. I think you need to have a lie down.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Hello?

lines.speaker: Sack
lines.text: Mumblemumble

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I found this amulet. Do you know what it is?

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: It doesn't look like anything I've seen in the past, I don't think I'll have a use for it.

lines.speaker: Sack
lines.text: Ahem!

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Although actually, thinking about it, I can take it off your hands if you'd like?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: For free? I've helped the museum enough, do you have anything I could exchange it for?

lines.speaker: Sack
lines.text: Mumble

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: I could give you 30 big bones per amulet, I've built up quite a collection recently.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Here's 30 big bones, come back if you find another amulet.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thank you. maybe another time.

lines.speaker: Odd Old Man
lines.text: Here's [input * 30] big bones, come back if you find another amulet.
